raw.message: Gehe viele Schritte, um neue Arten von Deko-Pikmin zu entdecken.

hook.summary: Colorful Pikmin characters run across a stylized map background.
hook.visual_action: A variety of Pikmin carrying everyday objects run across a light green map.

scene_flow: A group of diverse Pikmin run across a light green map background.
Individual Pikmin with unique accessories like a toothbrush and a toy train are shown in motion.
The video concludes with the Pikmin Bloom logo and a download button.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers and Nintendo fans who enjoy cute characters and outdoor activities.
